Event: Autumn Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: T136
Maple Leaf Fall Totem

The totem owner deals magic damage equal to 25% of the targets' max health to 3 random enemy units (priority: mages) every 4 sec and disarms them for 2 sec. Disarmed units can't use weapon abilities for the duration. When the effect ends, the targets are frightened for 1 sec.

Requirements: 90

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Autumn Festival 2025

Event date: 01/09/2025

Sage bot code: T136

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 4 secs
